columns.extraction_plan: Extract the median age '67.6' from the 'Median age, years (range)' row under the 'Orteronel (n = 638)' column in Table 1 on page 5. This is corroborated by text on page 4 stating 'The median age of the patients for the orteronel ... arms was 67.6 ... years, respectively'.

Extract the median age '68.1' from the 'Median age, years (range)' row under the 'Bicalutamide (n = 641)' column in Table 1 on page 5. This is corroborated by text on page 4 stating 'The median age of the patients for the ... control arms was ... 68.1 years, respectively'.
